expectations.text: The output is valid prd.json with at least 5 user stories.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Task Statuses",
  "branchName": "task-statuses",
  "description": "Add task statuses for pending, in progress, and done work.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Adding task status storage",
      "description": "As a user, I want each task to store a status so the app can persist pending, in progress, and done state.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Add a status field with default 'pending'",
        "Existing tasks resolve to pending on read or migration",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/tasks/schema.ts",
        "src/tasks/migrations/*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Updating task status from actions",
      "description": "As a user, I want to change a task status so I can move work through the workflow.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Saving a status change persists the new value for the task",
        "Status updates reject invalid status values",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/tasks/actions.ts",
        "src/tasks/service.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Showing task status badges",
      "description": "As a user, I want task cards to show the current status so I can scan work quickly.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task cards show a badge for pending, in progress, and done",
        "Badge text matches stored task status",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/tasks/components/task-card.tsx",
        "src/tasks/components/task-status-badge.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Changing task status in the list",
      "description": "As a user, I want to change status from the task list so I can update work without opening details.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "List view provides a status control for each task",
        "Changing the control saves immediately",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/tasks/components/task-list.tsx",
        "src/tasks/components/task-status-select.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Filtering tasks by status",
      "description": "As a user, I want to filter tasks by status so I can focus on specific work states.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Filter options include all statuses",
        "List updates to match the selected status",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/tasks/components/task-filter.tsx",
        "src/tasks/page.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover schema, backend status updates, badge display, status controls, and filtering.

expectations.text: Every story sets passes to false, notes to an empty string, and includes Typecheck passes.
